news.summary: One of the world's leading historians on the Palestinian people has told FRANCE 24 about how there is a future basis for peace in the region. news.headline: 2 months jail for Hong Kong security guard who shared post urging Legco poll boycott
news.summary:
A Hong Kong man has been jailed for two months for sharing a social media post urging residents to shun last year’s Legislative Council election.
